The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Haunted Rift

Etched symbols pulse malevolently.
Circles remnant of void invites.
Outer walls bear breach marks.
Whispers of roused Old Ones.
R'lyeh artifacts plague source.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • NOR- ok south is actually the way ot go here
  • LEVEL 3
  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUN
  • 煙花
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
